title: psychanthus iboensis
intro: Psychanthus iboensis, also known as the African shrub or Ibo shrub, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. The plant has been traditionally used in medicine, particularly in West Africa, for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Psychanthus iboensis include its use in treating various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Traditionally, the plant is prepared by making a decoction or infusion from its leaves, which can be consumed as a tea or applied topically to affected areas.
